arts.ttl: “Shock for me” – Issame Charaï on Phillippe Clement exit, and what Rangers have told him
arts.sum: Rangers assistant manager Issame Charaï has told Gazet van Antwerpen that Phillippe Clement’s exit from Ibrox came as a “shock” to him. On January 29th, the Scottish club appointed Charaï as assistant manager and less than a month later, they sacked Clement.
